personal.name: Fatih Serhat Turan
personal.title: Fullstack Developer
personal.description: A passionate software developer specialized in Vue.js and .NET Core, working with microservice architectures and modern technologies.

about: Hello, I'm Fatih Serhat Turan. I'm a software engineer specialized in fullstack development, creating high-performance and sustainable projects using Clean Architecture, Onion Architecture, and various design patterns.
I work with technologies such as .NET Core, Vue.js, MongoDB, MSSQL, Docker, and Kubernetes, implementing modern application architectures and microservice approaches in my projects.
I am currently working as a Software Development intern at Doğuş Technology and pursuing my education in Computer Engineering at Kocaeli University.

experience.title: Software Development Intern
responsibilities: Gained hands-on experience with Agile Scrum processes and developed a strong working practice aligned with agile methodologies.
Worked as a Full Stack Developer, building scalable web applications using .NET Core and C# with Clean Architecture, Onion Architecture, and various design patterns.
Developed dynamic and user-friendly interfaces with Vue3 and optimized data management using MSSQL and MongoDB.
Achieved 2nd place in an internal generative AI competition with a smart document tool that automates document requirements in business processes.
Gained experience in product development, AI/ML, and the use of OpenAI models as part of the productization goals for the smart document tool.
Integrated Azure OpenAI models into the business management system developed for Doğuş İnşaat, enabling AI-powered process automation and data analysis capabilities.

experience.title: Research and Development Intern
experience.company: Kocaeli University Computer Research and Application Center
responsibilities: Developed a corporate web application with a user-friendly interface, utilizing MSSQL and MongoDB. Applied Clean Architecture, Onion Architecture, SOLID principles, and various design patterns to enhance performance and maintainability on both frontend and backend.
Designed and developed the Marmarakaf reservation system, ensuring efficient booking management and a seamless user experience.

experience.title: Software Developer Volunteer
responsibilities: Contributed to volunteer software projects for Kocaeli University Hospital, working with various medical departments.
Applied software engineering principles to healthcare applications, improving patient care coordination and clinical workflow efficiency.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Engineering
education.description: I am continuing my education in Computer Engineering. Throughout my education, I am building a comprehensive academic foundation in software development, algorithm design, database management, and system architecture.

Developed a containerized, integrated data management system utilizing Onion Architecture principles to seamlessly connect independent APIs with distributed databases. Implemented Elasticsearch for efficient full-text search capabilities and optimized data retrieval across the distributed system architecture. Applied practical, hands-on development approaches to solve complex data federation challenges in a containerized environment using Docker and orchestration tools.

projects.title: Business Process Application
projects.description: An enterprise web application developed using Clean Architecture, Onion Architecture, and various design patterns, supported by MSSQL and MongoDB.

projects.title: UI-GPT: AI-Powered Interface Generator
projects.description: UI-GPT is a single-page web application that harnesses the power of artificial intelligence to generate user interface code based on natural language descriptions. This tool bridges the gap between design ideas and implementation by allowing users to describe their interface needs in plain language and receive ready-to-use code in multiple frameworks.

projects.title: Intelligent Document Tool
projects.description: A generative AI-based intelligent document tool that automates document requirements in business processes, using OpenAI models.

projects.title: Integrated Data Management System
projects.description: A containerized, integrated data management system utilizing Onion Architecture principles to seamlessly connect independent APIs with distributed databases, featuring Elasticsearch for efficient full-text search capabilities.

projects.title: Marmarakaf Reservation System
projects.description: Designed and developed a reservation system ensuring efficient booking management and a seamless user experience.
